questionHtml: Explain the events that cause the sound shown on the phonocardiogram at the start of systole.
markschemeHtml:
a. when the ventricle contracts blood presses/pressure acts on the AV valve

b. this closes the AV valve «which causes the sound»

The valve must be identified as the AV or atrioventricular valve

meta.title: Explain the events that cause the sound shown on the phonocardiogram at the start of systole.
